name: 格斗
description: 以利爪进行高速近身格斗的武器类型，兼具攻击速度与机动性。
descriptionEn: A weapon type for high-speed close combat using claws, combining attack speed with mobility.

name: 桐丸
description: 咲里的异常伴生体桐丸，贪吃的奇异生物，与咲里协同作战。
descriptionEn: Sakiri's anomalous companion Kiroumaru, a gluttonous creature that fights alongside her.

name: 变形十字盾
description: 可变形的十字盾，能在攻防之间自由切换，适合攻防一体的战斗风格。
descriptionEn: A transforming cross-shield that freely switches between offense and defense for versatile combat.

name: 异能构装体
description: 操控多个异能构装体进行协同战斗，可同时应对多个目标。
descriptionEn: Controls multiple esper constructs for coordinated attacks against multiple targets.

name: 言灵之力
description: 以言灵之力构筑防御阵地，为队友提供强大的防护支援。
descriptionEn: Uses the power of incantations to build defensive formations, providing strong protection for allies.

name: 剑
description: 经典的剑术武器，以精准的剑技进行战斗。
descriptionEn: A classic sword weapon, engaging in combat with precise swordsmanship.

name: 唐伞刀
description: 唐伞形态的刀，收合时为伞、展开时为刀的变形武器。
descriptionEn: A katana disguised as a traditional umbrella, transforming between parasol and blade forms.

name: 液态弧光
description: 液态弧光武器，可灵活变形的远程支援武器。
descriptionEn: A liquid-type arc weapon, a flexible ranged support weapon that can reshape itself.

name: 载具
description: 战斗用载具，擅长高速移动和运输。
descriptionEn: Combat vehicle specialized in high-speed movement and transportation.

name: 杖剑与 Sunyas
description: 杖剑与伴生体 Sunyas 协同作战的复合战斗方式。
descriptionEn: A hybrid combat style using a cane sword alongside the companion Sunyas.

name: 影操控
description: 以影子操控进行战斗的异能，擅长从暗处发起攻击。
descriptionEn: An esper ability that manipulates shadows, specializing in attacks from the darkness.

name: 双刃
description: 双持短刃进行快速战斗，攻速极高。
descriptionEn: Dual-wielding short blades for extremely fast-paced combat.

name: 构装体
description: 操控构装体进行战斗，兼具攻击和支援能力。
descriptionEn: Controls constructs for battle, combining offensive and support capabilities.

name: 刃翼
description: 以刃翼为武器进行战斗，兼具飞行和攻击能力。
descriptionEn: Fights using blade wings, combining flight capabilities with offensive power.

name: 妖锤
description: 大型妖锤武器，攻击范围广，破坏力极强。
descriptionEn: A large yokai hammer with a wide attack range and devastating destructive power.

name: 鉴定能力
description: 鉴定师独有的异常物品鉴定能力，能识别和分析奇物与异象。
descriptionEn: The Appraiser's unique ability to identify and analyze anomalous objects, Oddities and Anomalies.

name: 鞭剑
description: 可伸缩的鞭形剑，在远近距离之间灵活切换的武器。
descriptionEn: A flexible whip-sword that can extend and retract, switching between close and mid-range combat.

name: 混沌宝珠
description: 操控混沌能量形成的宝珠进行远程攻击。
descriptionEn: Controls chaos energy formed into orbs for ranged attacks.

name: 血刃
description: 以生命能量凝聚的赤红色刀刃，攻击时会消耗少量生命值但造成高额伤害。
descriptionEn: Life-energy condensed crimson blades that sacrifice a small amount of health for high damage output.

name: 念力屏障
description: 以灵魂力量构筑防护屏障，为队友提供坚实的防御。
descriptionEn: Constructs protective barriers using psychic power, providing solid defense for allies.

name: 暗羽
description: 以黑暗能量凝聚的羽毛进行远程攻击，可同时发射多枚追踪弹。
descriptionEn: Dark energy feathers used for ranged attacks, capable of launching multiple homing projectiles.

name: 虎牙
description: 以猛虎之力强化的格斗武器，攻击带有生命属性的震荡效果。
descriptionEn: Combat weapon enhanced with tiger power, attacks carry Anima-attribute shock effects.

name: 焰符
description: 以咒术符纸为媒介释放火焰攻击，可贴附在敌人身上延迟引爆。
descriptionEn: Incantation talismans that unleash fire attacks, can be attached to enemies for delayed detonation.

name: 重力锤
description: 操控重力场的大锤，攻击时可产生吸引敌人的引力效果。
descriptionEn: A large hammer that manipulates gravity fields, creating gravitational pulls that draw enemies in.

name: 相位刃
description: 可在不同相位间切换的刃武器，能穿透常规防御。
descriptionEn: Blades that can shift between phases, capable of penetrating standard defenses.

name: 音波吉他
description: 以音波振动为武器的吉他型装置，范围攻击效果出色。
descriptionEn: A guitar-shaped weapon using sonic vibrations, excellent for area-of-effect attacks.

name: 磁力拳套
description: 操控磁场进行近距离格斗的拳套，可吸引或排斥金属物体。
descriptionEn: Gauntlets that control magnetic fields for close combat, can attract or repel metallic objects.

name: 时之沙漏
description: 操控局部时间流速的沙漏型异能装置，可减缓敌人行动。
descriptionEn: An hourglass-type esper device that controls local time flow, slowing enemy movements.

name: 墨笔
description: 以水墨之力绘出攻击的魔法笔，画出的图案会实体化为攻击手段。
descriptionEn: A magical brush using ink power, drawn patterns materialize into attacks.

name: 链镰
description: 链式镰刀武器，可近距离挥砍也可远距离抛掷攻击。
descriptionEn: A chain-connected scythe for both close-range slashes and long-range throws.

name: 晶碎
description: 操控结晶体碎片进行远程穿透攻击。
descriptionEn: Controls crystal shards for long-range piercing attacks.

name: 傀儡线
description: 操控不可见的丝线控制敌人的傀儡型武器。
descriptionEn: Controls invisible strings to manipulate enemies, a puppet-type weapon.

name: 虚空镰
description: 切割空间本身的大镰刀，攻击时会留下空间裂缝。
descriptionEn: A scythe that cuts through space itself, leaving spatial rifts with each strike.

name: 等离子炮
description: 蓄力型等离子射击武器，单发伤害极高但攻击速度较慢。
descriptionEn: A charged plasma射击 weapon with extremely high single-shot damage but slow attack speed.

name: 自然藤蔓
description: 操控植物藤蔓进行束缚和治疗的支援型武器。
descriptionEn: Controls plant vines for binding enemies and healing allies, a support-type weapon.

name: 镜盾
description: 可反射敌人攻击的镜面盾牌，也能用于侦查。
descriptionEn: A mirror shield that can reflect enemy attacks and be used for reconnaissance.

name: 雷鼓
description: 以雷电之力强化的战鼓，敲击时释放范围雷击。
descriptionEn: War drums enhanced with lightning power, releasing area thunder strikes when beaten.

name: 冰扇
description: 释放冰霜风暴的折叠扇，能大范围减速敌人。
descriptionEn: A folding fan that releases frost storms, capable of slowing enemies in a wide area.

name: 重力靴
description: 强化踢技的重力靴，可在墙壁和天花板上行走。
descriptionEn: Gravity boots that enhance kick attacks, allowing the user to walk on walls and ceilings.

name: 灵弓
description: 发射灵力箭矢的长弓，箭矢可追踪目标。
descriptionEn: A longbow that fires spirit arrows capable of tracking targets.

name: 纳米虫群
description: 操控纳米级机器人群体进行攻击和修复的科技武器。
descriptionEn: Controls swarms of nanobots for attacks and repairs, a technology-type weapon.

name: 魂灯
description: 吸收和释放灵魂能量的灯笼，可为队友恢复能量。
descriptionEn: A lantern that absorbs and releases soul energy, restoring energy for allies.
